---
title: "Open Government Data, opendata.swiss"
date: "2026-02-22"
output: html_document
---

## Dataset: business-organisation-v2

Neue Version v2 der Stammdaten und Metadaten vom System atlas (https://atlas.app.sbb.ch), bereitgestellt seit 7. Januar 2026 (atlas-v2).

[Direct link by **opendata.swiss** for dataset](https://opendata.swiss/de/dataset/business-organisation-v2)<br>
[Direct link by **Geschäftsstelle Systemaufgaben Kundeninformation (SBB AG)** for dataset](https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/business-organisation-v2)

Auto-generated R starter code for the dataset business-organisation-v2@oevch.

## Metadata

- **Publisher.name** `nan`
- **Organization.display_name.de** `Geschäftsstelle Systemaufgaben Kundeninformation (SBB AG)`
- **Organization.url** `https://www.opentransportdata.swiss`
- **Maintainer** `None`
- **Maintainer_email** `None`
- **Keywords.de** `[]`
- **Issued** `2025-12-01T08:22:00`
- **Metadata_created** `2025-12-02T01:24:28.650993`
- **Metadata_modified** `2026-02-22T00:22:53.938201`


# Load packages

```{r}

library(tidyverse)
library(skimr)

```

# Load data

-   The dataset has 3 distribution(s) in CSV format.
-   All available CSV distributions are listed below and can be read into a tibble.

```{r}

# Distribution 0
# Package_id               : 23ad6f76-3d6f-42fc-a177-ee967ce9fa8b
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-02-21T01:10:08.904448
# Modified                 : 2026-02-21T01:10:08.904448
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/f0d5278e-4376-4cde-b02c-c5bf9a348673/resource/ff5c8583-df30-4b14-8534-2043a2a4de6e/download/timetable-years-business-organisation.csv')

# Distribution 1
# Package_id               : 23ad6f76-3d6f-42fc-a177-ee967ce9fa8b
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-02-21T01:10:06.913175
# Modified                 : 2026-02-21T01:10:06.913175
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/f0d5278e-4376-4cde-b02c-c5bf9a348673/resource/6bc140cf-42a7-4547-9fd8-09260f30de41/download/full-business-organisation.csv')

# Distribution 2
# Package_id               : 23ad6f76-3d6f-42fc-a177-ee967ce9fa8b
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-02-21T01:10:04.778087
# Modified                 : 2026-02-21T01:10:04.778087
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/f0d5278e-4376-4cde-b02c-c5bf9a348673/resource/ba1ffc89-945c-4550-aaf4-0f45e312987d/download/actual-date-business-organisation.csv')



```

# Analyze data

```{r}

glimpse(df)
str(df)
skim(df)

head(df)
tail(df)

```

# Continue your code here...

```{r}

```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Contact

opendata@sbb.ch | Open data platform mobility Switzerland
